**Internal Deal Memo**

**Project Codename: Operation Phoenix**

Date: October 12, 2023

Prepared by: Mr. John Tan Wei Ming  
Reviewed by: Dr. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah

We are pleased to present the preliminary details regarding the acquisition of Stellar Innovations Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 200912345G) under the codename Operation Phoenix. The total transaction value is projected at SGD 45,000,000, to be formalized in the Sale and Purchase Agreement (the "SPA"). Further references to the SPA in this document will detail specific terms.

Contact: +65 6123 4567  
Email: john.tan@fakesgcorp.sg

Please note that the current project status does not indicate any deviation from the initial project plan. Our due diligence has revealed no significant financial discrepancies. The team can access further details at https://example.sg/user/S7890123F.

For more information, please refer to the attached documents or contact Dr. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah at siti.aishah@fakesgmail.sg.
